title: Nearly 90% of American adults are vulnerable because they are missing this key document
summary: Nearly 90% of American adults lack a critical legal document, leaving families vulnerable to costly court battles if something happens to them. This article explores why estate planning is essential.
content: Here’s why your family is likely to end up in court if something happens to you.

zh.title: 近90%的美国成人容易受伤害，因为他们缺少这份关键文件
zh.summary: 近90%的美国成人缺少一份关键的法律文件，如果发生意外，这会使家庭容易陷入代价高昂的法庭纠纷。本文探讨了为什么遗产规划至关重要。

title: I gave my friend’s daughter cash for her wedding. I did not receive a thank-you card. Do I say something?
summary: A gift-giver wonders whether to address the absence of a thank-you card after giving cash to a friend's daughter's wedding. The article explores etiquette norms around wedding gift acknowledgment.
content: “They cashed the check 10 days after the wedding.”

zh.title: 我给朋友的女儿送了现金作为婚礼礼物。我没有收到感谢卡。我应该说什么吗？
zh.summary: 一位送礼者想知道在给朋友女儿的婚礼送现金后，是否应该提及缺少感谢卡。本文探讨了婚礼礼物确认的礼仪规范。

title: Justice Department refuses to assist French probe into Musk’s X, WSJ reports
summary: The Justice Department has declined to assist France's year-long investigation into Elon Musk's X platform for suspected algorithmic abuse and fraudulent data extraction. The refusal reflects ongoing tensions between US and French tech oversight approaches.
content: Musk faces questions as part of a year-long probe in France into suspected abuse of algorithms and fraudulent data extraction by X or its executives.

zh.title: 司法部拒绝协助法国对马斯克X平台的调查，华尔街日报报道
zh.summary: 司法部拒绝协助法国对埃隆·马斯克X平台长达一年的调查，该调查涉及涉嫌的算法滥用和欺诈性数据提取。这次拒绝反映了美国和法国之间在科技监管方法上持续存在的紧张关系。

title: It’s ridiculously easy for kids to get hooked on gambling. Here’s how parents can help.
summary: The proliferation of sports-betting apps and prediction markets has made gambling dangerously accessible to teenagers, with many parents unaware of the problem. The article provides guidance for parents to address teen gambling risks.
content: The rise of sports-betting apps and prediction markets has turbocharged teen gambling on games — and parents often have no idea.

zh.title: 孩子极容易染上赌博成瘾。以下是父母如何帮助的方法。
zh.summary: 体育博彩应用和预测市场的激增使赌博对青少年来说危险地容易获得，许多家长对这个问题一无所知。本文为家长提供了应对青少年赌博风险的指导。

title: My friend’s girlfriend went ‘ballistic’ after learning he gives his kids $19,000 a year. Is this a red flag?
summary: A relationship advice column addresses conflict after a man's girlfriend reacted negatively to learning he allocates $19,000 annually to his children. The article explores financial fairness and relationship dynamics in blended family situations.
content: “He spent $1,000 on his girlfriend at Christmas and several hundred dollars on each of her children.”

zh.title: 我朋友的女友在得知他每年给孩子花19000美元后勃然大怒。这是危险信号吗？
zh.summary: 一个关系建议专栏讨论了一个男人的女友在得知他每年为孩子分配19000美元后做出负面反应所引发的冲突。该文章探讨了混合家庭情况下的财务公平和关系动态。

title: There's an 'art' to writing AI prompts for personal finance, MIT professor says
summary: An MIT professor shares strategies for crafting effective AI prompts to get better personal finance guidance. The article highlights how prompt quality directly impacts the usefulness of AI-generated financial advice.
content: There's a good and bad way to write effective artificial intelligence prompts for personal finance advice.

zh.title: MIT教授表示，编写个人财务AI提示词是一门"艺术"
zh.summary: 一位MIT教授分享了制作有效AI提示词的策略，以获得更好的个人财务指导。该文章强调了提示词质量如何直接影响AI生成财务建议的有用性。

title: Trump signs order to speed review of psychedelics, including the controversial drug ibogaine
summary: President Trump signed an executive order to expedite federal review of psychedelic drugs, including ibogaine, which is currently classified as a Schedule I controlled substance. The move signals a potential shift in drug policy toward potential therapeutic research.
content: Ibogaine is banned under the federal government's most restrictive category for illegal, high-risk drugs.

zh.title: 特朗普签署行政令加速迷幻药物审批，包括争议性药物依博金
zh.summary: 特朗普总统签署了一项行政令，以加快联邦对迷幻药物的审查，包括目前被列为第一类管制物质的依博金。此举表明药物政策可能朝向潜在的治疗研究转变。

title: Here are 3 forces that drove a remarkable, record-setting week on Wall Street
summary: The S&P 500 achieved a record close above 7,100 and completed its fastest turnaround since 1990, driven by three major market forces. The market momentum reflects renewed investor confidence.
content: The S&P 500 closed above 7,100 for the first time as it completed its fastest turnaround since 1990.

zh.title: 推动华尔街创纪录一周的三大力量
zh.summary: 标普500指数创下7,100以上的历史新高，完成了自1990年以来最快的反弹，由三大市场力量驱动。市场势头反映了投资者信心的恢复。

title: Iran war, $4 gas, took all the fun out of the U.S. consumer economy. There's only so much time to bring it back
summary: U.S. consumers continue spending despite geopolitical tensions and high gas prices, but are pulling back on entertainment and dining, hurting local economies. The article examines whether consumer confidence can rebound from current headwinds.
content: Consumers are still spending amid U.S.-Iran war and $4 gas prices, but there's a pullback at entertainment and dining venues hitting local economies hard.

zh.title: 伊朗战争、4美元汽油摧毁了美国消费经济的活力。只有有限的时间来恢复
zh.summary: 美国消费者尽管面临地缘政治紧张局势和高油价，仍在继续消费，但在娱乐和餐饮方面支出下降，伤害了当地经济。该文章探讨消费者信心是否能从当前逆风中反弹。

title: Naomi Watts wants women to own their menopause journey: 'Why is it so taboo when we are half the population?'
summary: Actress Naomi Watts launched Stripes Beauty to destigmatize menopause and empower women to take control of their health during this life transition. The venture addresses a major gap in women's health and confidence.
content: Actress and entrepreneur Naomi Watts founded Stripes Beauty with a singular mission: helping women take control of menopause health and aging with confidence.

zh.title: 娜奥米·瓦茨希望女性掌控自己的更年期之旅：当我们占人口的一半时，为什么这么禁忌？
zh.summary: 女演员娜奥米·瓦茨推出Stripes Beauty品牌，旨在消除更年期的污名化，赋予女性在这一人生阶段掌控自身健康的能力。该企业填补了女性健康和自信心领域的重大空白。

title: AI fears drive some young adults to grad school — 'people shelter in higher education,' expert says
summary: Young adults are increasingly pursuing graduate degrees as a hedge against AI-driven labor market disruption, with experts noting education serves as a 'shelter' during economic transitions. The trend reflects anxieties about job displacement.
content: Experts say going back to school for a graduate degree is one way to hedge against a rapidly changing labor market.

zh.title: 对AI的恐惧驱使年轻人进入研究生院——人们在高等教育中避难，专家表示
zh.summary: 年轻人越来越多地追求研究生学位，以应对AI驱动的劳动力市场破坏，专家指出教育在经济转型期间充当避难所。这一趋势反映了人们对工作流失的担忧。

title: Child psychologist: This common issue can hurt kids' future success, happiness—they won't just 'grow out of it'
summary: Test anxiety can undermine children's academic performance and long-term success if left unaddressed, warns clinical psychologist Tram Huynh. Early intervention is critical, as anxiety often persists without proper support.
content: Test anxiety can hurt your child's academic performance and, if left unchecked, their future success and well-being, says clinical psychologist Tram Huynh.

zh.title: 儿童心理学家：这个常见问题会伤害孩子的未来成功和幸福——他们不会只是自然长大后解决
zh.summary: 临床心理学家Tram Huynh警告，如果不加以解决，考试焦虑可能会破坏儿童的学术表现和长期成功。早期干预至关重要，因为焦虑往往在没有适当支持的情况下持续存在。

title: How to tell if your dating standards are too high—or too low: Harvard-trained psychologist
summary: Psychologist Sabrina Romanoff examines how to assess whether dating standards are realistic or problematic, emphasizing the importance of understanding where those standards originate. The analysis helps people avoid both settling and excessive selectivity.
content: Ask yourself, where do your standards come from, says psychologist Sabrina Romanoff.

zh.title: 如何判断你的约会标准太高还是太低——哈佛训练的心理学家
zh.summary: 心理学家萨布丽娜·罗马诺夫研究了如何评估约会标准是否现实或存在问题,强调了解这些标准来源的重要性。该分析帮助人们避免妥协和过度挑剔两个极端。

title: Trump expects his Fed chair nominee to cut interest rates. Here’s how Kevin Warsh might try to do it.
summary: President Trump's Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh will face Senate questioning about his interest rate outlook at his confirmation hearing. The article explores potential mechanisms Warsh might use to pursue rate cuts.
content: Warsh will be pressed on his outlook for rates at his Senate confirmation hearing Tuesday.

zh.title: 特朗普期待他的美联储主席候选人降低利率。凯文·沃什可能会如何尝试？
zh.summary: 特朗普总统提名的美联储主席候选人凯文·沃什将在其确认听证会上面临参议院关于其利率前景的质询。该文章探讨了沃什可能用来追求降息的潜在机制。

title: These Alzheimer’s drugs were supposed to revolutionize the way we fight the disease. The reality is more complicated.
summary: Recent scientific scrutiny questions the real-world effectiveness of Leqimbi and Kisunla, two heavily promoted Alzheimer's drugs marketed as breakthrough treatments. The analysis suggests their disease-slowing benefits may be more limited than initial claims suggested.
content: A scientific report has raised questions about how much Leqimbi and Kisunla — the “breakthrough” Alzheimer’s drugs that have hit the market in the last few years — really help slow the disease.

zh.title: 这些阿尔茨海默病药物原本应该革新我们对抗这种疾病的方式。但现实更加复杂。
zh.summary: 最近的科学审查质疑了Leqimbi和Kisunla两种备受推崇的阿尔茨海默病药物的实际有效性,这两种药物被宣传为突破性治疗。该分析表明,它们减缓疾病进展的益处可能比最初声称的更有限。

title: The real outcome of the Iran war: America is now the world’s most secure energy power
summary: The US, possessing fuel resources and geographic advantages, positions itself as a safer energy alternative to Middle Eastern suppliers amid the Iran conflict.
content: Trump’s message is ‘buy American’ — the U.S. has fuel and is a safe alternative to the Gulf

zh.title: 伊朗战争的真相：美国成为全球最安全的能源强国

title: How to slay the U.S. tax-code dinosaur
summary: Replacing the federal tax code with three simple flat taxes could address entitlement program solvency and balance the federal budget, according to the proposed reform.
content: We could rescue Social Security and Medicare and balance the federal budget by scrapping the entire federal tax code and replacing it with three simple flat taxes.

zh.title: 如何消灭美国税法这只恐龙
zh.summary: 根据改革方案，用三种简单的统一税率替代联邦税法，可以解决社会保障计划的偿付能力问题并实现联邦预算平衡。

title: American rejects merger talks with United Airlines
summary: American Airlines firmly rejected speculation of a merger with United Airlines, confirming it has not engaged in any discussions with the competitor.
content: American Airlines said on Friday that it was not interested in a merger with United Airlines and had not held any talks.

zh.summary: 美国航空公司坚决否认了与联合航空合并的传言，并确认未与该竞争对手进行任何谈判。

title: A new era of AI crime has arrived with Anthropic’s Mythos
summary: A new AI model from Anthropic poses significant crime risks that are difficult to address, raising concerns about the evolving threat landscape.
content: Anthropic’s new model is a frightening reminder of the threat posed by AI — and it’s not clear what the solution is.

zh.title: Anthropic的Mythos带来了人工智能犯罪的新时代
zh.summary: Anthropic推出的新AI模型构成重大犯罪风险，难以解决，引发了人们对不断演变的威胁格局的担忧。

title: AI companies are rationing compute. That’s a boon for traditional software, one analyst says.
summary: As AI companies restrict computing resources, traditional software companies benefit, with sentiment potentially shifting away from AI investments.
content: A closely followed iShares software ETF just had its best week in 25 years, as some believe the sentiment around AI may be changing — at least for now.

zh.title: AI公司限制计算资源。分析师称这对传统软件是个机会。

title: ‘I have full guardianship’: My son has special needs. If I buy him a condo, will that hurt his benefits?
summary: A parent with guardianship of a special-needs child seeks guidance on whether purchasing property would compromise the child's government benefits.
content: “Another option would be for me to purchase the condo myself and have him pay me rent.”

zh.summary: 一位特殊需求孩子的监护人寻求指导，了解购买房产是否会影响孩子的政府福利。

title: We spoke to over 30 central bankers, policymakers and politicians. Here are their top concerns
summary: Central bankers and policymakers cite stagflation and energy security as primary concerns emerging from the ongoing US-Iran conflict.
content: From stagflation to energy security, policymakers spoke to CNBC about the biggest risks arising from the ongoing U.S.-Iran war.

zh.title: 我们与30多名央行官员、政策制定者和政治家进行了交谈。以下是他们最关心的问题
zh.summary: 央行官员和政策制定者指出，滞胀和能源安全是因美伊冲突而产生的主要关切。

title: Nexstar says it will appeal following U.S. judge ruling halting Tegna merger
summary: Nexstar announced plans to appeal a federal ruling that blocked its acquisition of broadcaster Tegna, as antitrust cases continue.
content: Nexstar will appeal a judge's ruling halting its acquisition of rival broadcaster Tegna, as ​antitrust challenges from DirecTV ​and a group of states proceed.

zh.title: Nexstar表示将对美国法官叫停Tegna合并的裁决提出上诉

title: Trump says U.S. has 'good news' on Iran as Tehran says the Strait of Hormuz is closed again
summary: Trump signaled progress in US-Iran negotiations, indicating both nations will jointly recover nuclear material once a deal is finalized.
content: President Trump tells reporters that the U.S. and Iran will jointly recover nuclear material after a deal is reached.

zh.summary: 特朗普表示美伊谈判取得进展，表明一旦达成协议，两国将共同回收核材料。

title: U.S. renews Russian oil waiver after pressure from countries dealing with Iran war price shocks
summary: The US extended waivers on Russian oil sanctions amid pressure from nations affected by Iran war-related energy costs, sparking debate over Ukraine policy.
content: Lawmakers accused the government of going easy on Moscow as its war on Ukraine grinds on.

zh.title: 美国在伊朗战争价格冲击压力下延期俄罗斯石油豁免

title: Iran war causing staycation spike - holiday firms
summary: Rising geopolitical tensions from the Iran conflict are driving holiday cancellations, with travelers citing increased costs and uncertainty. Holiday firms report a shift toward staycations as consumers avoid international travel destinations.
content: One man says he cancelled his holiday to Spain due to the rising costs and uncertainty.

zh.title: 伊朗战争引发居家度假热潮 - 假期公司
zh.summary: 伊朗冲突导致的地缘政治紧张局势正在推动度假取消，旅行者因成本增加和不确定性而选择居家度假。度假公司报告消费者避开国际旅游目的地的趋势。

title: 'It's sad': The U.S.-UK 'special relationship' sours ahead of royal visit to Washington
summary: The US-UK alliance has strained significantly over the past year, creating diplomatic tensions as Britain prepares a royal visit to Washington.
content: A year ago, it was all going so well for the U.S. and U.K.'s so-called "special relationship", but ties have soured.

zh.title: "令人伤心"：美英"特殊关系"在英国王室访问华盛顿前恶化
zh.summary: 美英同盟在过去一年中关系严重紧张，在英国王室访问华盛顿之际造成了外交紧张局势。
